title: G6PD Activity Assay Protocol
author: Wen Aw
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rwbd7an
materials: Protein concentration is determined by Bradford Assay

steps.title: Homogenize 2 larvae in 40uL of...
steps.instruction: Homogenize 2 larvae in 40uL of lysis buffer (20mM Tris-HCL, pH8.0, 3mM magenesium chloride, 1mM EDTA, 0.02% B-mercaptoethanol, Protease inhibitor and 0.1% Triton X100)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,000g for 15min at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,000g for 15min at 4 degree celcius and collected the supernatant

steps.title: Prepare NADPH standard ranges from 0-0
steps.instruction: Prepare NADPH standard ranges from 0-0.3mM in buffer

steps.title: Buffer containing 5mM of both G6P+ 6PGL, 2mM NADP+
steps.instruction: Buffer containing 5mM of both G6P+ 6PGL, 2mM NADP+

steps.title: Added NADP+ into all well (2
steps.instruction: Added NADP+ into all well (2.5uL of 80mM +37.5uL of Tris Buffer)

steps.title: Added 10uL of sample to make...
steps.instruction: Added 10uL of sample to make up a final volume of 50uL

steps.title: Initiate reaction by adding 50uL of...
steps.instruction: Initiate reaction by adding 50uL of substrate (G6P+6PGL (both 5mM final concentration ) or 6PGL (5mM final concentration)
